root_cause_hypothesis: After an incremental block report invalidates the full-report session, collect_full_block_report sees invalidated=true and returns None without starting a fresh session. A subsequent full report with a new total_len is therefore discarded, so async reconcile never clears the stale second-block location.
planned_changes: If an existing full-report session is invalidated, remove it so the next full report starts clean.
Only mark existing sessions invalidated (do not insert a stub invalidated session for unknown workers).
not_goals: Do not change worker-side report scheduling.
Do not refactor unrelated master FS APIs.

risk.rationale: Localized session lifecycle fix; matches prior CUR-49 patch that is not yet on upstream/main.
